overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character exploring a futuristic neon-lit pedestrian bridge and city streets at night. The character ascends concrete stairs, walks through a vibrant illuminated tunnel with LED flooring, explores a dark concrete corridor, returns through the tunnel, and descends to a wet city street surrounded by towering buildings and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell ascending to pedestrian bridge

events.description: emerging from enclosed concrete stairwell into neon-lit bridge entrance
ambient light shifts to vibrant purple and cyan neon illumination

agents.ego_description: character walking up concrete stairs toward the colorful neon-lit bridge entrance

entered.detail: brutalist concrete staircase with metal edges ascending upward
metal handrails lining both sides of the stairwell
colorful neon-lit arched structure marking the tunnel entrance
tall glass office buildings visible through openings in the structure

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a brutalist concrete stairwell with metal handrails, transitioning from dim artificial lighting into a vibrant neon-lit space. The colorful arched entrance of the pedestrian bridge becomes visible ahead, with glimpses of glass tower buildings through the openings.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated pedestrian bridge with colorful LED arches

events.description: entering the fully enclosed neon tunnel with glowing LED floor panels
character briefly runs to catch up with pedestrian ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the vibrant neon tunnel following another pedestrian figure ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead through the tunnel wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: tunnel structure with alternating colored neon arches in purple, cyan, and orange
glowing floor panels with shifting colored light patterns
metal mesh ceiling with grid pattern between the arched supports
large digital advertisement screens visible through the mesh sides

segments.scene_description: The character enters a stunning neon-lit pedestrian tunnel with colorful arched supports and glowing LED floor panels. The mesh ceiling reveals digital billboards outside as the character follows a pedestrian through the vibrant corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete corridor with fluorescent wall lighting

events.description: exiting the vibrant neon tunnel into a darker concrete corridor
character stops and turns around to head back toward the tunnel

agents.ego_description: entering the darker corridor area, exploring briefly, then turning around to return

entered.detail: dimly lit brutalist concrete hallway with rough textured walls
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the concrete walls
illuminated advertisement posters in glass cases on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character exits the vibrant tunnel into a dimly lit concrete corridor with fluorescent wall lights and digital posters. After a brief exploration, the character turns around to head back toward the colorful neon bridge.

events.description: re-entering the colorful neon tunnel from the dark corridor
briefly passing behind a structural column on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking back through the neon tunnel toward the stairwell exit

entered.detail: tunnel structure with alternating colored neon arches in purple, cyan, and orange
glowing floor panels with shifting colored light patterns

segments.scene_description: The character re-enters the vibrant neon tunnel, walking back through the colorful arches and glowing LED floor panels. The tunnel appears from the opposite direction, revealing debris piles along the sides as the character heads toward the exit.

events.description: exiting neon tunnel into descending concrete stairwell
ambient light increases as approaching the street level exit

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs toward the street level exit

notable_agents.action: vendor standing by food cart at the bottom of the stairs

entered.detail: concrete staircase descending downward with metal handrails
street food vendor cart with illuminated display at street level

segments.scene_description: The character descends a concrete stairwell leaving the neon tunnel behind, approaching the street level exit. A food vendor cart becomes visible at the bottom of the stairs as natural city light increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with wet pavement and neon reflections

events.description: exiting stairwell onto open city street with wet reflective pavement
vehicles driving past on the wet road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city street observing the neon-lit surroundings and towering buildings

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the wet road with headlights on

entered.detail: rain-soaked asphalt street reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
elevated highway or monorail structure crossing above the street
large holographic advertisement billboards glowing with bright colors

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide futuristic city street with wet pavement reflecting the vibrant neon lights from towering buildings and holographic billboards. An overhead highway structure spans the intersection as vehicles drive past and pedestrians cross the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim brutalist stairwell through a vibrant neon corridor and back again, finally emerging into a sprawling futuristic city street. It begins by ascending concrete stairs under dim artificial light, moving toward the colorful arched entrance of a pedestrian bridge where glass towers are visible in the distance. As the camera enters the tunnel, the environment transforms into a vivid display of glowing LED floor panels and arched supports before shifting into a dimly lit concrete corridor lined with fluorescent lights and digital posters. The scene then reverses course, passing back through the neon arches and debris-strewn tunnel before descending a final set of stairs toward a food vendor cart. Finally, the camera emerges onto a wide city street with wet pavement that reflects the towering holographic billboards and neon lights of the surrounding skyline.
